activities.title: Dust off that ukulele and play one song badly
activities.description: Pick literally any song you know. It will sound weird. Play it anyway.

activities.title: Read exactly one chapter of that book on your nightstand
activities.description: Just one. You can stop. (You probably won't.)

activities.title: Cook that recipe you bookmarked three months ago
activities.description: The one you kept saying you'd make. Do it now. Bonus: eat it immediately.

activities.title: Learn three chords on the guitar you haven't touched
activities.description: YouTube is free. Your fingers will hurt. Worth it.

activities.title: Sketch something stupid in a notebook
activities.description: A doodle. A weird face. Your colleague's expression during that boring meeting. No skill required.

activities.title: Text an old friend a meme without context
activities.description: The randomness will either kill them or confuse them. Either way, connection.

activities.title: Practice one magic trick from YouTube
activities.description: Coin vanish. Card trick. Something to make your family groan.

activities.title: Call someone you haven't talked to in months
activities.description: Not a text. A voice call. They'll be weirdly happy about it.

activities.title: Try that yoga video you've had bookmarked forever
activities.description: 20 minutes. Your back will thank you. Your ego will be humbled.

activities.title: Reorganize one shelf in your home like you're a set designer
activities.description: Aesthetics. Feng shui. Chaos control. Pick a corner and go feral.

activities.title: Write terrible poetry about your coffee
activities.description: Haiku. Couplets. Nonsense. Your espresso deserves an ode.

activities.title: Do a 10-minute cold plunge breathing drill
activities.description: Sounds intimidating. Changes your nervous system. Navy SEALs swear by it.

activities.title: Binge one season of that show everyone's been mentioning
activities.description: Guilt-free. It's Saturday. You've earned this couch time.

activities.title: Learn to make the perfect cup of tea or coffee
activities.description: Temperature, timing, technique. Become unbearable about it.

activities.title: Walk to a place you've never been in your neighbourhood
activities.description: 30 minutes. No headphones. Weird alley, new tea shop, random park.

activities.title: Teach yourself one TikTok dance trend (badly)
activities.description: Mirror required. Shame optional. You will laugh at yourself.

activities.title: Quiz yourself on trivia like it's exam season
activities.description: No pressure. No grades. Just flex your brain for fun.

activities.title: Listen to a podcast episode about literally anything
activities.description: True crime. Fungi. Someone's weird hobby. Rabbit holes exist for a reason.

activities.title: Attempt to paint or sketch a portrait from memory
activities.description: It'll be weird. It'll be yours. That's enough.

activities.title: Play one round of an online multiplayer game with friends
activities.description: Screaming optional. Connection mandatory.

activities.title: Recreate a dish from your favourite restaurant at home
activities.description: Fail gloriously. Succeed accidentally. Either way, dinner's sorted.

activities.title: Learn five new words in a language you're half-learning
activities.description: Duolingo streak or app of choice. Five minutes. That's it.

activities.title: Make homemade ice pops in flavours you want
activities.description: Frooti. Mango. Coffee. Freeze overnight. Summer adult moment.

activities.title: Spend 20 minutes arranging your workspace like a set designer
activities.description: Plants. Lights. Symmetry. Make it Instagram-worthy by accident.

activities.title: Read the Wikipedia rabbit hole for 45 minutes
activities.description: Started with potatoes. Ended up at Byzantine philosophy. No regrets.

activities.title: Play a boardgame against yourself or an AI
activities.description: Chess. Checkers. Weird indie game. Competition with zero stakes.

activities.title: Write a brutally honest review of something you own
activities.description: Your phone. Your shoes. That blender. Roast it like a critic.

activities.title: Start a small herb garden on your windowsill
activities.description: Basil. Mint. Coriander. Watch something grow that isn't you.

activities.title: Attempt the weirdest recipe trending on the internet
activities.description: It will fail. It will be hilarious. You'll have a story.

activities.title: Watch a random short film from a festival
activities.description: 15 minutes of weird. No plot required. Pure experience.

activities.title: Teach yourself basic hand lettering or calligraphy
activities.description: YouTube tutorial. Pen and paper. Make your handwriting pretty.

activities.title: Play music and just dance like no one's watching
activities.description: Playlist. Living room. Zero choreography. Pure chaos.

activities.title: Organize your photos into folders instead of chaos
activities.description: Yes, it's boring. Yes, you'll feel incredible after.

activities.title: Take yourself on a solo coffee shop date
activities.description: New place. A book or just thoughts. Awkwardly romantic with yourself.

activities.title: Learn one photography composition rule and use it
activities.description: Rule of thirds. Golden hour. Symmetry. Point and shoot with intention.

activities.title: Write angry letters to people you'll never send
activities.description: Get it out. Rant. Catharsis. Then delete it all.

activities.title: Make a ridiculous playlist for a specific mood
activities.description: Chaotic energy. Sad girl hours. Road trip anthems. Own it.

activities.title: Try a new recipe you've never even heard of
activities.description: Spin a country on a globe. Cook something random from there.

activities.title: Learn how to properly tie five different knots
activities.description: Useful. Weirdly satisfying. Look cool at the next camping trip.

activities.title: Sit outside and do absolutely nothing for 20 minutes
activities.description: No phone. No book. Just exist. Sounds boring. Sounds necessary.

activities.title: Attempt to draw what you see without looking at the paper
activities.description: Blind contour drawing. It will look insane. That's the point.

activities.title: Make a mood board for a hypothetical life change
activities.description: New apartment. Dream job. Alternate reality. Pinterest rabbit hole.

activities.title: Try meal prepping one component for the week
activities.description: Grilled chicken. Chopped veggies. One thing. Future you high-fives present you.

activities.title: Attend a free event happening in your city this weekend
activities.description: Street performance. Art festival. Random cultural thing. Show up.

activities.title: Create a fake dating profile for your best friend as a joke
activities.description: Roast them. Exaggerate. Describe their weird habits. Laugh till you cry.

activities.title: Spend an hour learning about something that fascinates you
activities.description: Deep dive into an obscure hobby, science, or conspiracy. Become unhinged about it.

activities.title: Film yourself doing something ridiculous and keep it private
activities.description: Comedy bit. Bad lip sync. Weird dance. Just for you.

activities.title: Make a list of things that made you laugh this week
activities.description: Meme. Moment. Weird thing someone said. Gratitude but make it funny.

activities.title: Learn one Adobe Illustrator trick from a 12-min YouTube rabbit hole
activities.description: Find some random design channel, learn to make a swoosh or gradient or whatever. You'll use it in like three emails this month.

activities.title: Sit through one Coursera lecture on something you'll never use professionally
activities.description: Urban design. Food history. Botany. Pick whatever sounds chill and hit play. No assignments, no guilt-quitting at minute 8.

activities.title: Watch a woodworking YouTube tutorial you have zero tools for
activities.description: Joinery, hand planing, mortise-and-tenon. Cozy craftsperson energy with zero commitment. Bookmark it for that hypothetical garage you'll never have.

activities.title: Learn basic leather embossing from a Skillshare preview
activities.description: 5-minute intro to stamp techniques. You'll want to buy supplies but won't. Satisfying anyway.

activities.title: Find a weirdly specific Coursera course halfway through
activities.description: Renewable energy in Southeast Asia. Blockchain basics. Cognitive biases. Jump in at week 4, absorb what sticks.

activities.title: Copy a calligraphy stroke from an Instagram Reel, five times
activities.description: No pen? Use a thick marker and paper. Meditative, pointless, weirdly satisfying.

activities.title: Binge a YouTube channel about antique restoration for 90 minutes
activities.description: Wooden chairs, old paintings, brass hinges. Hypnotic. You will not want to restore anything.

activities.title: Learn to braid using a YouTube tutorial meant for kids
activities.description: Dutch, French, fishtail. Pick one. Your brain will be confused but patient YouTube will repeat it.

activities.title: Watch a talk about the history of Indian typography
activities.description: Some designer will make letterforms sound like drama. Unexpectedly cool.

activities.title: Try one origami fold from a 10-minute YouTube video
activities.description: Crane, box, jumping frog. Follow along once. Fold it wrong. Never try again. Still counts.

activities.title: Steal a pottery hand technique from an Instagram tutorial
activities.description: How to center, throw, pinch. You have no wheel. Do it in the air anyway.

activities.title: Take a Coursera quiz you're not enrolled in, just for fun
activities.description: Snoop around, find a practice test, see how weird the questions are. No stakes, all the trivia.

activities.title: Learn to tie four different types of knots in 15 minutes
activities.description: Bowline, clove hitch, figure-eight, reef knot. YouTube will show you slow-motion rope magic.

activities.title: Watch a designer explain their process for 22 minutes
activities.description: Portfolio walkthroughs, sketching, iteration. Someone else's creative thinking as ASMR.

activities.title: Learn to make one cocktail from a bartender's YouTube
activities.description: Proper technique, ice handling, balance. You'll probably use cheap rum and it'll taste 70% as good.

activities.title: Watch a Coursera lecture on something that contradicts your job
activities.description: You're in tech? Learn about sustainable fashion. You're in finance? Learn about music theory.

activities.title: Learn to identify five Indian spices by smell
activities.description: Grab what's in your kitchen. YouTube a spice guide. Your nose will get confused.

activities.title: Watch a maker explain their craft for exactly 19 minutes
activities.description: Leatherwork, glassblowing, perfume. Pure competence ASMR. No voiceover, just hands.

activities.title: Learn the basics of film composition from a YouTube essay
activities.description: Rule of thirds, depth, framing. Suddenly every movie makes more sense. Weirdly satisfying.

activities.title: Sit through one Coursera module on a skill you secretly want
activities.description: Photography, copywriting, illustration. Just the theory part. No project deadline.

activities.title: Learn to whistle a Carnatic scale from a YouTube tutorial
activities.description: Raag basics, mouth positioning, patience. You'll sound like a confused bird.

activities.title: Watch a talk about the psychology of design for 24 minutes
activities.description: Why colors work, how fonts persuade, why your brain falls for it. Mildly unsettling.

activities.title: Learn to sketch architectural perspectives in 20 minutes
activities.description: Vanishing points, depth, proportion. Your buildings will lean wrong. That's the vibe.

activities.title: Watch a jeweler's YouTube explaining their entire process
activities.description: Soldering, stone-setting, finishing. Hypnotic precision. Zero relevance to your life.

activities.title: Do a Coursera assignment you didn't enroll for, just curious
activities.description: Find an old course, peek at the problem set. Solve one question. Leave without finishing.

activities.title: Learn basic watercolor washes from a 12-minute tutorial
activities.description: Wet-on-wet, gradients, blooms. You'll use a ballpoint pen instead. Still meditative.

activities.title: Watch someone explain their entire design philosophy
activities.description: A designer, architect, or maker talking about what drives their work. 30 mins of pure intent.

activities.title: Learn to tie a necktie knot you've never used before
activities.description: Four-in-hand, Windsor, Pratt. YouTube will untangle your confusion three times.

activities.title: Sit through one Coursera video essay about art history
activities.description: Renaissance, Modern, Contemporary. You'll retain 40% and feel oddly cultured.

activities.title: Watch a chef break down proper knife technique for 11 minutes
activities.description: Grip, angle, rhythm. You'll still chop like a tired parent, but you'll know better.

activities.title: Learn to draw one type of perspective cube from YouTube
activities.description: Isometric, one-point, two-point. Your cube will be lopsided. Accept it.

activities.title: Watch a Coursera mini-lecture on an industry you're not in
activities.description: Supply chain, biotech, fashion. Dip in, learn the jargon, leave mystified but slightly smarter.

activities.title: Learn the history of a random craft from a video essay
activities.description: Bookbinding, hat-making, rope-work. YouTube has passionate historians for everything.

activities.title: Watch a photographer explain their creative process and style
activities.description: Light, composition, intention. 20 minutes of someone else thinking out loud.

activities.title: Learn to fold a fitted sheet from the YouTuber who finally figured it out
activities.description: That one satisfying video everyone shared. You'll forget by next laundry day.

activities.title: Take a Coursera video about communication or writing, no strings
activities.description: How to write clearly, speak persuasively, listen better. Useful, boring, painless.

activities.title: Learn to identify five fonts from a YouTube crash course
activities.description: Serif, sans-serif, script, slab. You'll become insufferable at dinner.

activities.title: Watch a craftsperson's 25-minute YouTube walk through their studio
activities.description: Tools, materials, workspace. Pure aesthetic calm. No narration, just sounds.

activities.title: Sit through a Coursera video about innovation or problem-solving
activities.description: Design thinking, systems thinking, creative process. You'll use one idea next Tuesday.

activities.title: Watch a YouTube video about the history of one Indian craft
activities.description: Indigo dyeing, block printing, weaving, metalwork. Stories embedded in technique.

activities.title: Learn to doodle zentangles from a 9-minute YouTube flow
activities.description: Repetitive patterns, meditative, looks fancy, is mindless.

activities.title: Watch a talk about the future of a craft or skill you love
activities.description: Ceramics, coding, fashion. Someone's thoughts on where it's heading.

activities.title: Take one Coursera quiz from a course you'll never finish
activities.description: See if you'd actually pass. Find out you have gaps. Feel smarter anyway.

activities.title: Learn to sketch basic figure anatomy in 18 minutes
activities.description: Proportions, gesture lines, skeleton. Your figures will be stiff. That's fine.

activities.title: Watch a long-form YouTube about the evolution of one design
activities.description: The chair, the light bulb, the typewriter. Someone's obsession becomes contagious.

activities.title: Sit through one Coursera lecture on ethics, philosophy, or culture
activities.description: No job relevance. Pure thinking. You'll feel smarter for two days.

activities.title: Learn to make one proper pasta shape from a YouTube chef
activities.description: Hand-formed ravioli, pappardelle, cavatelli. Yours will be lumpy. Cook it anyway.

activities.title: Watch a designer talk about failure and how they recovered
activities.description: Real talk, not inspiration speech. Someone admitting what didn't work.

activities.title: Call your college roommate out of nowhere
activities.description: No agenda. Just hear their voice. Bet they pick up weird.

activities.title: Ask your parents about something from your childhood
activities.description: A memory. A funny story. A weird family recipe origin. Sit with the answer.

activities.title: Dig up an old group chat and start it again
activities.description: Those college friends. Send one message. See if chaos reignites.

activities.title: Text your cousin you haven't spoken to in years
activities.description: Just 'hey how are you actually doing.' Bet something interesting comes back.

activities.title: Voice note your friend about a petty drama
activities.description: You need to vent. They need the entertainment. Win-win.

activities.title: Ask someone how they actually met their partner
activities.description: Not the polite version. The real story. These are weirdly good.

activities.title: Recreate Maggi the way you ate it after school
activities.description: Egg, mayo, cheese, whatever chaos. Taste the exact nostalgia.

activities.title: Make fruit popsicles from scratch
activities.description: Frooti, mango, whatever. Freeze them. Eat them when they're perfect.

activities.title: Design a Pokemon gym leader card for yourself
activities.description: Your name. Your type. Your team. Make it official.

activities.title: Quiz yourself like it's exam season
activities.description: Pick a topic you vaguely know. No stakes. Just see what sticks.

activities.title: Breathe like a Navy SEAL for 10 minutes
activities.description: Sounds dumb. Works scary well. Your nervous system will feel it.

activities.title: Plan the most pointless road trip ever
activities.description: 3 states, weird food stops, no budget. Map it. Dream it.

activities.title: Make a playlist from songs you loved at 16
activities.description: Spotify deep dive. Cringe optional. Nostalgia mandatory.

activities.title: Call a friend and ask them to teach you something
activities.description: Cooking tip, random fact, life skill. Let them show off.

activities.title: Walk to a place you've never been in your locality
activities.description: Even 2km away. Spot something new. Buy something weird.

activities.title: Hunt for the cheapest street food in your area
activities.description: Best samosa? Best chai? Build a mental map. Report back.

activities.title: Teach yourself card shuffles from TikTok
activities.description: Riffle shuffle. Butterfly. Impress literally nobody.

activities.title: Learn a 30-second magic trick
activities.description: Coin vanish. Card prediction. Perfect ice-breaker or nobody cares.

activities.title: Start that book everyone's been recommending
activities.description: First 30 pages. No pressure to finish. Just see if it hooks you.

activities.title: Watch a cricket gully match nearby
activities.description: Sit. Eat something. Watch chaos. Indian cricket at its purest.

activities.title: Text your ex and ask how they're actually doing
activities.description: Maturity moment. Or chaos. Depends on the ex.

activities.title: Sketch your house like an architect
activities.description: Top-down view. Measurements rough. It's chaos but fun.

activities.title: Listen to a podcast episode from a stranger's recommendation
activities.description: Random. Off your usual feed. Let weird find you.

activities.title: Text someone and ask them to share a secret
activities.description: Nothing dark. Just something they don't usually say.

activities.title: Learn to make the perfect chai
activities.description: Proportions. Timing. Obsess. Your version is the only right one.

activities.title: Sit on a park bench and people-watch for 30 minutes
activities.description: Make up stories. No phone. Just observe.

activities.title: Write a letter to your 18-year-old self
activities.description: Not sappy. Honest. What do they need to know?

activities.title: Challenge a friend to a weird game over text
activities.description: 20 questions. Riddles. Dares. Keep the match going.

activities.title: Watch a random Wikipedia rabbit hole for 45 minutes
activities.description: Start with anything. See where you end up. Chaos.

activities.title: Go to a random shop you've never entered
activities.description: Antique store. Fabric shop. Whatever's nearby. Spend 20 minutes.

activities.title: Send a voice note listing your top 5 worst decisions
activities.description: To someone who'll laugh. Not judge. Self-roast therapy.

activities.title: Try a new cuisine from a place nearby
activities.description: Not your usual spot. Something weird. Sit. Eat slowly.

activities.title: Ask your best friend what they miss about you
activities.description: Not needy. Genuine. Hear something real.

activities.title: Make a list of places in your city you've never been
activities.description: Even the ones 'everyone' goes to. Plan a solo tour.

activities.title: Teach yourself to juggle three items
activities.description: YouTube tutorial. 30 minutes. You'll either get it or laugh hard.

activities.title: Call your oldest friend and recall something stupid you did
activities.description: Together. From years ago. Laugh until your jaw hurts.

activities.title: Stretch like you're waking up a sleeping cat
activities.description: 10 minutes of no-rules stretching. Reach, twist, fold. Your back will thank you later.

activities.title: Drink water like it's a competitive sport
activities.description: Chug a full glass, then another. Boring? Yeah. But your skin and brain know what's up.

activities.title: Walk in actual sunlight for 15 minutes
activities.description: Not a stroll. Not a power walk. Just... be outside where it's bright. Vitamin D speedrun.

activities.title: Cold shower blast
activities.description: 30 seconds of cold water. Sounds awful. Feels incredible after.

activities.title: Phone in another room for 60 minutes
activities.description: Lock it away. Read, sketch, think, stare at a wall. Actually feels weird and weirdly good.

activities.title: Hunt through your kitchen for a forgotten snack
activities.description: Back of the freezer counts. Rediscover something you forgot you had.

activities.title: Call that friend you haven't heard from in months
activities.description: Not a text. Not a WhatsApp. Actual voice. 15 minutes. See what happens.

activities.title: Watch a street performer for 15 minutes
activities.description: Musician, magician, cricket-bat juggler. Free show, zero expectations.

activities.title: Reply to an old message someone actually cares about
activities.description: That group chat reply. That voice note. Low effort, high good-friend points.

activities.title: Lie on your back and watch clouds for 20 minutes
activities.description: Bring a mat, no phone. That's it. Surprisingly hard to do.

activities.title: Make a terrible playlist and actually listen to it
activities.description: Weird mashups, guilty pleasures, that one song you heard once. Commit for 30 minutes.

activities.title: Sketch your neighborhood from memory
activities.description: Not good art. Just... where's the shop, the temple, the potholes. 20 minutes, messy is fine.

activities.title: Reorganize one shelf in your house
activities.description: Just one. Put things where they actually make sense. Oddly satisfying.

activities.title: Listen to a podcast at 1.5x speed for 45 minutes
activities.description: True crime, history, comedy. Just go. You can multitask if you want.

activities.title: Walk to a shop you've never been to
activities.description: Could be a bookstore, a bakery, a random mall. Just explore for 30 minutes.

activities.title: Write three things you're weirdly good at
activities.description: Could be tying shoelaces fast or impersonating your boss. No judgment.

activities.title: Do 20 push-ups in chunks throughout the day
activities.description: 5 here, 7 there, 8 before dinner. Adds up. Your arms will remember.

activities.title: Text a friend a completely random memory you share
activities.description: The stupid inside joke, the terrible trip, that one weird day. No context needed.

activities.title: Sit outside with your drink for 25 minutes
activities.description: Tea, coffee, water, beer. Anywhere. No scrolling. Just exist.

activities.title: Google deep dives into a random Wikipedia rabbit hole
activities.description: Start with anything. 40 minutes later you'll be reading about 1700s spoon history.

activities.title: Try a recipe you saw on Instagram once
activities.description: Doesn't have to be good. Probably won't be. But you'll find out.

activities.title: Rate your top 5 meals you've had in the last year
activities.description: Just rank them. Write one sentence about each. See the pattern.

activities.title: Stretch while watching your favorite show
activities.description: 15 minutes of active stretching during an episode. Pretend it's workout time.

activities.title: Go to a park and sit on a different bench
activities.description: 20 minutes on a bench you've never sat on. Brings new perspective on the same place.

activities.title: Dance to three songs like no one's watching
activities.description: Door closed, volume up, whatever genre. 12 minutes. You'll move different.

activities.title: Take a different route home
activities.description: 30 minutes exploring a street you usually skip. Small-town speedrun.

activities.title: Teach yourself 10 words in a random language
activities.description: Google or YouTube. 20 minutes. Could be Mandarin, Korean, Italian.

activities.title: Photograph something small and ordinary
activities.description: A leaf, a shadow, a coffee cup. 30 minutes of mobile photography.

activities.title: Make a list of places you want to visit nearby
activities.description: Not out of country. Just... 100 km radius. Dream small for now.

activities.title: Moisturize your face and neck like you're a celebrity
activities.description: Actual face care for 10 minutes. Yeah, we skip this. Don't skip this.

activities.title: Listen to that one album you keep meaning to finish
activities.description: The one on your list for months. 50 minutes. Actually listen.

activities.title: Buy yourself a small thing you don't need
activities.description: Coffee, a book, a pen. Something under 500. Weird dopamine hit.

activities.title: Do a 10-minute meditation with zero pretense
activities.description: Guided, silent, whatever. Not to fix yourself. Just to sit.

activities.title: Compliment three people in real life
activities.description: Not online. Actually say it. Waiter, colleague, stranger. Watch them smile.

activities.title: Learn one cool fact about something you use every day
activities.description: Your phone, your chair, your toothbrush. Google it. 15 minutes.

activities.title: Sit in silence for 15 minutes
activities.description: No phone, no TV, no music. Just you and your thoughts. Weirder than you think.

activities.title: Text an old classmate out of nowhere
activities.description: Just 'Hey, been thinking about you.' See what happens.

activities.title: Plan your dream vacation you'll never take
activities.description: Budget irrelevant. Itinerary, hotels, everything. 45 minutes of pure fantasy.

activities.title: Walk to the nearest café and sit for 30 minutes
activities.description: Tea or coffee. Window seat if you can. Watch people.

activities.title: Deep-clean your kitchen drawer of shame
activities.description: The one where rubber bands live. Pull it all out, throw the sticky stuff away, wipe it down like you mean it.

activities.title: Organize your shoes by chaos level
activities.description: One shelf, five minutes of decisions. Heels here, sneakers there, that one broken flip-flop in the donation pile.

activities.title: Make paneer pakora from YouTube scratch
activities.description: Find that one video you bookmarked three months ago. Chop, dip, fry, eat standing over the sink like a normal person.

activities.title: Fix that one wobbly chair leg
activities.description: The one you've been rocking back on for six months knowing it'll snap. Screwdriver time. Ten minutes. Do it.

activities.title: Water your plants like they owe you money
activities.description: Check the soil. Actually water them. Talk to them if you want (no judgment). Takes five minutes, plants stay alive.

activities.title: Declutter your nightstand in 15 minutes
activities.description: Book pile, old receipts, three water glasses. Make it a game. Everything either goes or gets stacked.

activities.title: Call that friend from college you miss
activities.description: The one you haven't caught up with in months. Not a text. An actual voice call. Weird at first, then easy.

activities.title: Make homemade chai the long way
activities.description: Crush the spices yourself. Watch the milk bubble. Strain it twice. This is your weekend move.

activities.title: Wipe down your laptop screen and keyboard
activities.description: It's gross. You know it. Five minutes with a cloth and you'll feel like you own a new device.

activities.title: Learn to make dosa from a YouTube grandmother
activities.description: Find someone's mum teaching it. Watch once. Mess it up. Try again. You're now a dosa person.

activities.title: Organize your phone photos into folders
activities.description: The 47 blurry shots of your friend mid-laugh. Screenshots from 2019. Make it make sense. Cathartic.

activities.title: Make cold brew coffee like you're fancy
activities.description: Coarse grounds, cold water, 12 hours. Tomorrow you'll drink it and feel like you planned ahead.

activities.title: Scrub your bathroom mirror until it squeaks
activities.description: The toothpaste splatter. Gone. The dust. Gone. You'll actually want to use it now.

activities.title: Reorganize your spice rack by color
activities.description: Red chillies, turmeric, cumin seeds. Suddenly your kitchen looks like it has its life together.

activities.title: Go for a walk to a place you've never been
activities.description: Not exercise. Just wander one street over. See what's there. Ice cream shop? Random temple? Weird vibe.

activities.title: Backup your phone to the cloud
activities.description: You keep saying you will. Thirty minutes. Do it. Future you will thank you.

activities.title: Arrange your books by how much you loved them
activities.description: Favorite shelf at eye level. The disappointing ones somewhere far. Your bookshelf just became a personality test.

activities.title: Deep-clean between your couch cushions
activities.description: Vacuum, old coins, random stuff. You'll find things you forgot you owned.

activities.title: Learn a new card trick from Reddit
activities.description: Find the simplest one. Practice five times. Confuse your friends next weekend.

activities.title: Make instant khichdi with whatever's in the pantry
activities.description: Rice, dal, leftover veggies. Five minutes. Comforting. No recipe needed.

activities.title: Patch up that small tear in your jeans
activities.description: Hand sewing. Iron-on patch. Needle felt. You don't have to be good at it, just close enough.

activities.title: Text three people who made you laugh recently
activities.description: Not asking how they are. Just 'that thing you said had me laughing for ten minutes.' That's it.

activities.title: Clean out your email inbox trash folder
activities.description: Restore the three things you actually deleted by accident. Delete the rest. Unhinged but cathartic.

activities.title: Make homemade sambal with fresh chillies
activities.description: Grind, taste, adjust. Serve with absolutely everything. Suddenly your food tastes restaurant-level.

activities.title: Polish your shoes like you're in the military
activities.description: The good shoes, the everyday ones. Cloth, polish, buff. Takes 20 minutes and feels absurdly good.

activities.title: Defrost your freezer with a hairdryer
activities.description: Chaotic but faster than waiting. Towels for the meltdown. Science-fair energy.

activities.title: Make guacamole from scratch like you know what you're doing
activities.description: Avocado, lime, salt, cilantro. Two minutes. Taste testing is mandatory.

activities.title: Reorganize your bedside books by genre
activities.description: Fantasy, nonfiction, the one you've been meaning to start. Suddenly you'll want to read again.

activities.title: Sit outside with zero agenda for 20 minutes
activities.description: No phone. Just look at things. Watch a bird. Feel weird for two minutes. Then weirdly good.

activities.title: Unsubscribe from every email you don't open
activities.description: Bulk delete mode activated. Feels aggressive. Feels great.

activities.title: Make dal like someone taught you
activities.description: Simmer, temper, salt to taste. The comfort food you keep meaning to make.

activities.title: Tighten all your door handles and hinges
activities.description: Screwdriver. Five minutes. Everything stops squeaking. Small victories count.

activities.title: Quiz yourself like it's exam season but chill
activities.description: Pick a topic you half-know. Try to remember. Google if you fail. No consequences. Just vibes.

activities.title: Clean out your car in a rage-y way
activities.description: Old receipts, the cup holder situation, dust everywhere. Aggressive cleaning is still cleaning.

activities.title: Paint your nails like you have time
activities.description: Base coat, color, top coat. Not perfect. Yours. Takes 20 minutes and lasts a week.

activities.title: Learn how to juggle from a YouTube video
activities.description: Three balls. Ten minutes of failing. Suddenly one successful toss. That counts as winning.

activities.title: Fold your fitted sheet correctly for the first time
activities.description: YouTube tutorial. Watch twice. Do it. Feel like a wizard.

activities.title: Go to a random street food stall and try something
activities.description: Not your usual. The thing you've never ordered. Risk level: low. Regret level: nonexistent.

activities.title: Reorganize your closet by season
activities.description: Winter jackets back. Summer shirts forward. Takes an hour. Outfit decisions become easier.

activities.title: Make homemade granola and pretend you're healthy
activities.description: Oats, honey, whatever nuts you have. Bake it. Eat it from the jar. You are temporarily a wellness person.

activities.title: Watch a stranger's TED talk about something random
activities.description: Not your field. Not productivity advice. Just 12 minutes of a person talking passionately about weird stuff.

activities.title: Clean your laptop vents with compressed air
activities.description: It's been six months. You can see the dust. Five minutes. Technology actually runs cooler now.

activities.title: Read 20 pages of that book gathering dust
activities.description: Just 20. Not a chapter. Not "until you finish". Twenty pages and you're done.

activities.title: Sit on your balcony and do absolutely nothing
activities.description: No phone. No purpose. Just you, the sky, and whatever sounds show up.

activities.title: Walk around your neighbourhood like a lost tourist
activities.description: Phone stays home. Find one shop or corner you've never noticed before.

activities.title: Write the messiest journal entry possible
activities.description: Spelling? Grammar? Who cares. Just dump it on paper like no one's reading.

activities.title: Scroll through old photos like it's a museum
activities.description: Pick a year. Let yourself feel weird about how you looked, who was there, what mattered.

activities.title: Call someone you haven't spoken to in forever
activities.description: Not a text. Not DMs. An actual voice call. Weird but weirdly good.

activities.title: Organize one small corner of your space
activities.description: Not your entire room. One drawer. One shelf. Weirdly satisfying.

activities.title: Listen to one album from start to finish
activities.description: No skipping. No phone. Just the whole thing. Block it out.

activities.title: Watch clouds from your balcony
activities.description: Pretend you're supposed to be there. Make up stories about where they're going.

activities.title: Text your best friend a completely random memory
activities.description: Something dumb you both did. No context. See what they say.

activities.title: Make a playlist for a specific mood you're in
activities.description: Name it something honest. Sad, angry, drunk, horny, stuck in traffic — whatever.

activities.title: Brew tea or coffee like you're performing surgery
activities.description: Slow. Intentional. Temperature matters. Watch it happen.

activities.title: Walk to a café you've never been to
activities.description: Order something you can't pronounce. Sit. Be a regular for 45 minutes.

activities.title: Write a letter to your past self
activities.description: Advice, apologies, cringe — whatever. Don't send it.

activities.title: Learn to make one new thing in the kitchen
activities.description: YouTube tutorial + ingredients you have. One dish. Master it.

activities.title: Sit in different rooms and notice what you see
activities.description: Living room light at sunset. Kitchen corner at night. Weird but grounding.

activities.title: Create a fake Pokémon card of yourself
activities.description: Your attacks, your weaknesses, your health points. Make it ridiculous.

activities.title: Read Reddit threads about your city
activities.description: AskIndia, r/india, city subreddits. Gossip about where you live.

activities.title: Journal about one thing that annoyed you today
activities.description: Let it out. Be petty. No one's reading.

activities.title: Watch a YouTube video about something you know nothing about
activities.description: Chess strategy. Indie game speedruns. Marble racing. Go weird.

activities.title: Take a walk and pick up five interesting things
activities.description: A leaf, a rock, a bottle cap. Bring them home. Make something.

activities.title: List all the things you've been meaning to do
activities.description: Just write them down. No pressure to do them. Just get them out.

activities.title: Text five people something nice
activities.description: Not asking for anything. Just "thinking of you" or "you're funny." Small.

activities.title: Stretch while watching something
activities.description: Don't make it weird. Just move your body while distracted.

activities.title: Rate all the restaurants you've been to this year
activities.description: Rate them. Comment like you're a food critic who hated it.

activities.title: Make a list of songs that hit different now
activities.description: Songs that meant something once but mean something else now.

activities.title: Ride a bus or train to a random stop
activities.description: Get off. Walk around. See what's there. Get back on.

activities.title: Sit with your eyes closed for ten minutes
activities.description: Not meditation. Not napping. Just... closed. See what happens.

activities.title: Screenshot every meme that made you laugh today
activities.description: Save them. Make a folder. Call it "Evidence I'm Alive."

activities.title: Find a podcast episode and listen to half
activities.description: Start something. Don't finish. You can come back.

activities.title: Wander a market you've never been to
activities.description: No list. No plan. Just see what's there and what you want.

activities.title: Sit somewhere public and people-watch
activities.description: Make up stories. Guess lives. Be a spy, but lazy.

activities.title: Learn the lyrics to one song
activities.description: The whole thing. Sing it loud. Know it by heart.

activities.title: Ask someone random an interesting question
activities.description: Barista, stranger at a bus stop, friend. "What's something you recently learned?"

activities.title: Write a wish list for next year
activities.description: Big, small, stupid, impossible. Just write them.

activities.title: Film a terrible video for your friends
activities.description: Bad quality. Bad acting. Send it unsolicited. Chaos.

activities.title: Lie on your back and stare at the ceiling
activities.description: Think of nothing. Think of everything. Time dissolves.

activities.title: Pick one skill and YouTube a tutorial
activities.description: Cooking. Photography. Drawing. Just watch someone else do it well.

activities.title: Walk to the farthest point you've never been
activities.description: Your neighbourhood probably has edges you've never reached.

activities.title: Make a list of 20 things you're grateful for
activities.description: Sounds cheesy. Feels weird. Actually kind of nice.

activities.title: Redesign your phone home screen
activities.description: New wallpaper, new icons, new arrangement. Make it yours.

activities.title: Write a letter to someone you admire
activities.description: An actor, a friend, a random person. Tell them why. Don't send it.
